title: calceolaria viscosissima
intro: Calceolaria viscosissima, also known as sticky pocketbook or sticky slipper, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calceolariaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calceolaria viscosissima include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Calceolaria viscosissima can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
